---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem. e.g. "I'm always frustrated when I have to re-paste my code snippet every time I switch modes…"

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. Be specific about where it fits (a new mode, skill, module, agent, slash command, UI change, etc.).

## Alternatives considered

What alternatives you've considered, and why they're worse.

## Where it fits

Check the relevant layer(s):

- [ ] CLI mode (chat/explain/debug/generate/review/optimize)
- [ ] Skill (expert persona)
- [ ] Module (context tool)
- [ ] Agent (multi-step plan→execute)
- [ ] Coding Plan (structured roadmap)
- [ ] Connector / pipeline composition
- [ ] Terminal UI / UX
- [ ] Backend / API route
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## Mockup / example

If you can, sketch the UX. For a slash command, show the ideal interaction:

```
$ /your-command <args>
…expected output…
```

## Roadmap alignment

Check the [ROADMAP](https://github.com/zai/zlm-cli/blob/main/ROADMAP.md) — is this already planned? If so, which milestone?

## Additional context

Anything else relevant.
